eas_text: A civil authority has issued AN ADMINISTRATIVE MESSAGE for the following counties or areas: Maricopa, AZ; Arizona; at 3:03 PM on JUL 3, 2026 Effective until 11:03 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: This is the Arizona Department of Public Safety. A safe Alert has been issued for Maricopa County. The Chandler Police Department is looking for 73-year-old Mary Williams. Mary is a black female 5 feet tall, 9 inches tall, 165 pounds, with blonde wig and brown eyes. Mary was last seen wearing unknown clothing description. Mary was last seen on 07/03/2026 at 5:30 A.M. on foot near Queen Creek and Alma School Road leaving a group home in Chandler. Mary suffers from a medical condition which may cause her to become lost or easily confused. Please call 911 with information. If you have contact with this SAFE Alert, please call 911. Monitor TV and Radio for updates.
